issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios or edge cases for content creation.

scenarios.name: blog-post-type-script-adoption
scenarios.rationale: Response B better aligns with the rubric by including a hook and CTA, whereas Response A lacks both and also misses the required content brief and outline.

scenarios.name: landing-page-copy-project-management
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required opening content brief, but Response B explicitly outlines the landing page structure, giving it a slight edge over Response A.
